Uses of Class
org.moeaframework.core.Population

Packages that use Population
Package
Description
org.moeaframework.algorithm
Implementations of various algorithms and support tools for working with algorithms.
org.moeaframework.algorithm.continuation
Extends an algorithm with "continuations" or "restarts", where we periodically reseed an algorithm with random solutions and optionally adjust the settings.
org.moeaframework.algorithm.single
Implementations of various single-objective optimization algorithms.
org.moeaframework.analysis.collector
Collectors record information periodically during the execution of an algorithm.
org.moeaframework.analysis.plot
Basic 2D plotting support.
org.moeaframework.analysis.tools
Command line tools for evaluating MOEAs and analyzing results.
org.moeaframework.core
Contains the core classes used by this framework.
org.moeaframework.core.fitness
Implementations of various fitness assignment methods.
org.moeaframework.core.indicator
Collection of unary quality indicators for comparing the quality of non-dominated approximation sets.
org.moeaframework.core.operator
Package of various mutation and crossover operators.
org.moeaframework.core.selection
Package of various selection operators.
org.moeaframework.parallel.island
Implementation of the island model parallelization strategy.
org.moeaframework.util.clustering
Support for clustering of solutions, either using their decision variables (if numeric) or objective values.

  • Uses of Population in org.moeaframework.algorithm

    Subclasses of Population in org.moeaframework.algorithm
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    MSOPSRankedPopulation
    Population implementing the ranking scheme used by the Multiple Single Objective Pareto Sampling (MSOPS) algorithm.
    class 
    ReferencePointNondominatedSortingPopulation
    Implementation of the reference-point-based nondominated sorting method for NSGA-III.
    class 
    ReferenceVectorGuidedPopulation
    A reference vector guided population, for use with RVEA, that truncates the population using the method outlined in [1].
    Methods in org.moeaframework.algorithm that return Population
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Population
    MSOPSRankedPopulation.findNearest(int index, int size)
    Returns the neighborhood of solutions nearest to and including the given solution.
    Population
    AbstractEvolutionaryAlgorithm.getPopulation()
     
    protected Population
    SPEA2.truncate(Population offspring, int size)
    Returns the population of solutions that survive to the next generation.
    Methods in org.moeaframework.algorithm with parameters of type Population
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected List<List<Solution>>
    ReferencePointNondominatedSortingPopulation.associateToReferencePoint(Population population)
    Associates each solution to the nearest reference point, returning a list-of-lists.
    protected List<List<Solution>>
    ReferenceVectorGuidedPopulation.associateToReferencePoint(Population population)
    Associates each solution to the nearest reference vector, returning a list-of-lists.
    protected double[][]
    SPEA2.computeDistanceMatrix(Population population)
    Computes the distance matrix containing the pair-wise distances between solutions in objective space.
    void
    SPEA2.StrengthFitnessEvaluator.evaluate(Population population)
     
    Solution[]
    PESA2.RegionBasedSelection.select(int arity, Population population)
     
    protected void
    AbstractEvolutionaryAlgorithm.setPopulation(Population population)
    Sets the population used by this algorithm.
    protected Population
    SPEA2.truncate(Population offspring, int size)
    Returns the population of solutions that survive to the next generation.
    Constructors in org.moeaframework.algorithm with parameters of type Population
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    AbstractEvolutionaryAlgorithm(Problem problem, int initialPopulationSize, Population population, NondominatedPopulation archive, Initialization initialization, Variation variation)
    Constructs an abstract evolutionary algorithm.
     
    EpsilonMOEA(Problem problem, int initialPopulationSize, Population population, EpsilonBoxDominanceArchive archive, Selection selection, Variation variation, Initialization initialization)
    Constructs the ε-MOEA algorithm with the specified components.
     
    EpsilonMOEA(Problem problem, int initialPopulationSize, Population population, EpsilonBoxDominanceArchive archive, Selection selection, Variation variation, Initialization initialization, DominanceComparator dominanceComparator)
    Constructs the ε-MOEA algorithm with the specified components.
     
    VEGA(Problem problem, int initialPopulationSize, Population population, NondominatedPopulation archive, Initialization initialization, Variation variation)
    Constructs a new VEGA instance.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Plot
    Plot.add(String label, Population population)
    Displays the solutions in the given population in a 2D scatter plot.
    Plot
    Plot.add(String label, Population population, int x, int y)
    Displays the solutions in the given population in a 2D scatter plot.

    Methods in org.moeaframework.analysis.tools that return Population
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Population
    ReferenceSetMerger.getContributionFrom(String source)
    Returns the solutions in the combined non-dominated population originating from the specified source.
    Population
    ReferenceSetMerger.getPopulation(String source)
    Returns the original population associated with the specified source.
    Methods in org.moeaframework.analysis.tools with parameters of type Population
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    ReferenceSetMerger.add(String source, Population population)
    Adds the population from the specified source.

  • Uses of Population in org.moeaframework.core

    Subclasses of Population in org.moeaframework.core
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AdaptiveGridArchive
    Adaptive grid archive.
    class 
    EpsilonBoxDominanceArchive
    A non-dominated population using an ε-box dominance comparator.
    class 
    NondominatedPopulation
    A population that maintains the property of pair-wise non-dominance between all solutions.
    class 
    NondominatedSortingPopulation
    Population that maintains the rank and crowdingDistance attributes for its solutions by invoking NondominatedSorting.evaluate(Population).
    Methods in org.moeaframework.core that return Population
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Population
    Population.copy()
    Returns a copy of this population.
    Population
    Population.filter(Predicate<? super Solution> predicate)
    Returns a new population containing only the solutions matching the given predicate.
    Population
    EvolutionaryAlgorithm.getPopulation()
    Returns the current population of this evolutionary algorithm.
    static Population
    Population.loadBinary(File file)
    Loads a population from the specified file.
    static Population
    Population.loadBinary(InputStream inputStream)
    Loads a population from the specified input stream.
    static Population
    Population.loadObjectives(File file)
    Loads a set of objective vectors from the specified file.
    static Population
    Population.loadObjectives(Reader reader)
    Loads the objective vectors contained in the specified reader, returning the resulting population.
    Methods in org.moeaframework.core with parameters of type Population
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    double
    Solution.distanceToNearestSolution(Population population)
    Returns the Euclidean distance, in objective space, from this solution to the nearest solution in the population.
    double
    Solution.distanceToNearestSolution(Population population, DistanceMeasure<Solution> distanceMeasure)
    Returns the distance, as calculated by the given distance measure, from this solution to the nearest solution in the population.
    void
    FastNondominatedSorting.evaluate(Population population)
     
    void
    FitnessEvaluator.evaluate(Population population)
    Evaluates the fitness of solutions in the population, updating the Fitness attribute.
    void
    NondominatedSorting.evaluate(Population population)
    Performs non-dominated sorting on the specified population, assigning the rank and crowdingDistance attributes to solutions.
    static EpsilonBoxDominanceArchive
    EpsilonBoxDominanceArchive.of(Population population, Epsilons epsilons)
    Converts the population to an ε-box dominance archive with the given ε values.
    Solution[]
    Selection.select(int arity, Population population)
    Returns an array of length arity of solutions selected from the specified population.
    void
    NondominatedSorting.updateCrowdingDistance(Population front)
    Computes and assigns the crowdingDistance attribute to solutions.

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    FitnessBasedArchive
    Maintains a non-dominated archive of solutions with a maximum capacity.
    Methods in org.moeaframework.core.fitness with parameters of type Population
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    CrowdingDistanceFitnessEvaluator.evaluate(Population population)
     
    void
    HypervolumeContributionFitnessEvaluator.evaluate(Population population)
     
    void
    IndicatorFitnessEvaluator.evaluate(Population population)
     
    void
    IndicatorFitnessEvaluator.removeAndUpdate(Population population, int removeIndex)
    After calling IndicatorFitnessEvaluator.evaluate(Population), this method is used to iteratively remove solutions from the population while updating the fitness value.

    Method

    Normalizer.normalize(Population population)

    Method
    Description

    NativeHypervolume.invokeNativeHypervolume(Problem problem, Population population, boolean isInverted)

    Normalizer.normalize(Population population)

    Constructors in org.moeaframework.core.indicator with parameters of type Population
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    Normalizer(Population population)
    Constructs a normalizer for normalizing populations so that all objectives reside in the range [0, 1].
     
    Normalizer(Population population, double delta)
    Constructs a normalizer for normalizing populations so that all objectives reside in the range [0, 1].
     
    Normalizer(Population population, double[] referencePoint)
    Constructs a normalizer for normalizing populations so that all objectives reside in the range [0, 1].
     
    Normalizer(Problem problem, Population population)
    Deprecated.
    Use Normalizer(Population) instead
     
    Normalizer(Problem problem, Population population, double delta)
    Deprecated.
    Use Normalizer(Population, double) instead
     
    Normalizer(Problem problem, Population population, double[] referencePoint)
    Deprecated.
    Use Normalizer(Population, double[]) instead

  • Uses of Population in org.moeaframework.util.clustering

    Methods in org.moeaframework.util.clustering with parameters of type Population
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default void
    Clustering.truncate(int size, Population population)
    Truncates a population to the given size by forming clusters based on the objective values and selecting the representative member from each cluster.
